prompt: Generate a world map infographic using Image 1, Image 2, and Image 3 (book covers). For each book, mark the author’s region on the map and place the corresponding book cover near that location.
prompt_refined: Generate a world map infographic illustrating the geographical origins of three authors. On the map, clearly pinpoint the birth country of each author with a distinct marker or pin icon: Brazil for Paulo Coelho, Russia for Leo Tolstoy, and Sweden for Fredrik Backman. Adjacent to each marked country, precisely position its corresponding book cover image: Image 1 (The Alchemist by Paulo Coelho) near Brazil, Image 2 (Anna Karenina by Leo Tolstoy) near Russia, and Image 3 (A Man Called Ove by Fredrik Backman) near Sweden. The book covers should be appropriately scaled for clear visibility without obscuring the map. Ensure a clean, modern infographic style with a clear visual connection (e.g., thin lines or arrows) between each country marker and its associated book cover.
objects: Marker or pin icon on Brazil
Marker or pin icon on Russia
Marker or pin icon on Sweden
Book cover of "The Alchemist" positioned near Brazil
Book cover of "Anna Karenina" positioned near Russia
Book cover of "A Man Called Ove" positioned near Sweden
Visual connection (thin line or arrow) between Brazil marker and "The Alchemist" cover
Visual connection (thin line or arrow) between Russia marker and "Anna Karenina" cover
Visual connection (thin line or arrow) between Sweden marker and "A Man Called Ove" cover
